title: Aaron Aboagye's Framework for AI Ethics & Public Policy
description: A visual representation of the core components and their interplay in Aboagye's approach to ethical AI governance.
elements: Foundational Ethical Principles (e.g., Fairness, Accountability, Transparency)
relationships: Foundational Ethical Principles inform and guide the creation of Policy & Regulatory Instruments
Policy & Regulatory Instruments set the guardrails and requirements for Technical AI Development
Stakeholder Engagement provides crucial input and scrutiny to both Policy and Development processes
Technical Development and Deployment must be followed by Ongoing Monitoring, whose findings loop back to inform Principles, Policy, and Stakeholders, creating a continuous feedback cycle
